commands.review_summary:
The PR parallelizes bundled MCP catalog loading, bundled LSP initialization, and their startup coordination in embedded agent attempts.

PR surface: Source +93. Total +93 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the central latency shape: current main serializes MCP catalog loading before LSP startup, and the MCP catalog loop awaits each server in order. I did not establish a live before/after latency reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof and maintainer review are needed because automation cannot supply the contributor's real slow-server evidence and the concurrency tradeoff is runtime-sensitive.

target.title: perf(agents): parallelize MCP and LSP initialization to reduce cold-start latency
target.body:
## Summary

Every agent request incurs ~6-7 seconds of latency before the model starts generating. The bottleneck is the `bundle-tools` phase which loads all MCP servers and LSP tools upfront. The root cause: MCP server connections, LSP server spawning, and their coordination are all **sequential**.

## Root Cause

1. **MCP connections sequential**: `getCatalog()` iterates servers one at a time with a `for` loop, connecting and listing tools for each (~1-2s per server, 4 servers = 4-8s)
2. **LSP spawning sequential**: `createBundleLspToolRuntime()` spawns and initializes LSP servers one at a time
3. **MCP and LSP sequential**: `attempt.ts` awaits MCP completion before starting LSP

Trace evidence:
```
[trace:embedded-run] prep stages: totalMs=5889 stages=bundle-tools:5792ms@5809ms
[trace:embedded-run] prep stages: totalMs=6020 stages=bundle-tools:5898ms@5915ms
[trace:embedded-run] prep stages: totalMs=6527 stages=bundle-tools:6435ms@6449ms
[trace:embedded-run] prep stages: totalMs=7207 stages=bundle-tools:7132ms@7207ms
```

In all cases, `bundle-tools` accounts for **96-99% of total prep time**.

## Fix

### 1. Parallelize MCP server connections (`agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.ts`)

`getCatalog()` is restructured into 3 phases:
- **Phase 1 (sync)**: Resolve all transports and pre-compute safe names
- **Phase 2 (parallel)**: Connect to all servers and list tools concurrently via `Promise.all`
- **Phase 3 (sync)**: Assemble results

Cold-start wall-clock time is now bounded by the **slowest server** instead of the **sum of all servers**.

### 2. Parallelize LSP server initialization (`agent-bundle-lsp-runtime.ts`)

`createBundleLspToolRuntime()` uses the same 3-phase pattern:
- **Phase 1 (sync)**: Validate all configs
- **Phase 2 (parallel)**: Spawn and initialize all LSP servers via `Promise.allSettled`
- **Phase 3 (sync)**: Assemble results, deduplicate tool names

### 3. Run MCP and LSP in parallel (`attempt.ts`)

Instead of:
```ts
bundleMcpRuntime = await getOrCreateSessionMcpRuntime(...);
bundleMcpRuntime = await materializeBundleMcpToolsForRun(...);
bundleLspRuntime = await createBundleLspToolRuntime(...);
```

Now uses:
```ts
const [mcpResult, lspResult] = await Promise.all([
  mcpInitTask?.catch(err => { log.warn(...); return undefined; }),
  lspInitTask?.catch(err => { log.warn(...); return undefined; }),
]);
```

Each task catches its own errors so one failure does not block the other.

## Expected Improvement

For a typical setup with 4 MCP servers each taking ~1-2s to connect and list tools:
- **Before**: 6-8s (4 servers × ~1.5s + LSP time)
- **After**: ~1.5-2s (max server time + LSP time in parallel)

## Verification

All 243 tests pass across the modified surfaces:

| Test file | Result |
|----------|--------|
| `agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts` | 33/33 ✅ |
| `agent-bundle-lsp-runtime.test.ts` | 3/3 ✅ |
| `attempt.test.ts` | 122/122 ✅ |
| `attempt-stage-timing.test.ts` | 5/5 ✅ |
| `attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts` | 15/15 ✅ |
| `agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts` | 65/65 ✅ |

TypeScript (`tsgo`), lint (`oxlint`), and formatting (`oxfmt`) all pass.

## Files Changed

- `src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.ts` — Parallelize MCP catalog connections
- `src/agents/agent-bundle-lsp-runtime.ts` — Parallelize LSP server initialization
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts` — Parallelize MCP+LSP coordination

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
